features: [Suitable for Sensitive Skin] - Beauty7 fit wax strips facial and eyebrow sharper wax strips contains natural ingredients like beeswax and jojoba seed oil to care for delicate skin and suitable for sensitive skin.
[Easy to Use] - The wax paper does not need to be heated, and is easy to pull, which is convenient to use and save time.
[Up to 6 Weeks] - Beauty7 eyebrow wax strips remove hairs from the root, last silky skin for 6 weeks.
[Efficient in 3 SEC] - 3 seconds to be effective, more thorough hair removal, and a relaxing and pleasant hair removal experience.
[Eyebrow Strips Sharper pre-cut] - Beauty7 Brow Wax Strips was cuts a shape to fit most brow shapes, making it easy to use and reducing the hassle of wax sticking to the arrival of scissors.
